name: IRC_SEARCHES_DN
description: The denomalised table for IRC_SEARCHES to be used for the purpose of reporting.

columns.Name: SEARCHDN_ID
columns.Comments: The primary key of the table. Foreign referenced to IRC_SEARCHES.

columns.Name: FILTER_REHIRE_RECOMMENDATION
columns.Comments: The filter type values selected for rehire recommendation during candidate search.

columns.Name: FILTER_ASSESSMENT_PACKAGE
columns.Comments: The filter type values selected for assessment package during candidate search.

columns.Name: FILTER_ASSESSMENT_RESULT
columns.Comments: The filter type values selected for assessment result during candidate search.

columns.Name: FILTER_ASSESSMENT_PERCENTILE
columns.Comments: The filter type values selected for assessment percentile during candidate search.

columns.Name: FILTER_ASSESSMENT_SCORE
columns.Comments: The filter type values selected for assessment score during candidate search.

columns.Name: FILTER_ASSESSMENT_BAND
columns.Comments: The filter type values selected for assessment band during candidate search.

columns.Name: FILTER_CITIZENSHIP
columns.Comments: The filter type values selected for citizenship during candidate search.

columns.Name: SEARCH_ID
columns.Comments: The foregin reference search ID from IRC_SEARCHES.

columns.Name: SEARCH_KEYWORDS
columns.Comments: The search keyword or search string that was entered by the user.

columns.Name: SEARCH_BY_RESUME_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether search is performed includes resume.

columns.Name: SEARCH_BY_EMAIL_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether search is performed using email contact info or not.

columns.Name: SEARCH_MODE
columns.Comments: Stores the mode selected during candidate search.

columns.Name: SEARCH_BY_PHONE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether search is performed using phone contact info or not.

columns.Name: FILTER_LABEL
columns.Comments: The filter type values selected for label during candidate search.

columns.Name: FILTER_OPT_IN_MKT_EMAILS_PREF
columns.Comments: The filter type values selected for Marketing Emails Preference during candidate search.

columns.Name: FILTER_CANDIDATE_TYPE
columns.Comments: The filter type values selected for candidate type during candidate search.

columns.Name: FILTER_LOCATIONS
columns.Comments: The filter type values selected for locations during candidate search.

columns.Name: FILTER_DEGREES
columns.Comments: The filter type values selected for degrees during candidate search.

columns.Name: FILTER_COMPANIES
columns.Comments: The filter type values selected for companies during candidate search.

columns.Name: FILTER_YEARS_OF_EXP
columns.Comments: The filter type values selected for years of experience during candidate search.

columns.Name: FILTER_LAST_UPDATED_DATE
columns.Comments: The filter type values selected for candidate last updated date during candidate search.

columns.Name: PRECRITERIA_CAND_DETAILS
columns.Comments: The pre criteria values selected for details during candidate search.

columns.Name: PRECRITERIA_LOCATION
columns.Comments: The pre criteria values selected for location during candidate search.

columns.Name: PRECRITERIA_EDUCATION
columns.Comments: The pre criteria values selected for education during candidate search.

columns.Name: PRECRITERIA_EXPERIENCE
columns.Comments: The pre criteria values selected for experience during candidate search.

columns.Name: PRECRITERIA_COMPANY
columns.Comments: The pre criteria values selected for company during candidate search.

columns.Name: FILTER_BASIC_INFO
columns.Comments: The filter type values selected for basic info during candidate search.

columns.Name: FILTER_SOURCE
columns.Comments: The filter type values selected for source during candidate search.

columns.Name: FILTER_SOURCE_MEDIUM
columns.Comments: The filter type values selected for source medium during candidate search.

columns.Name: FILTER_POOL
columns.Comments: The filter type values selected for pool during candidate search.

columns.Name: FILTER_LANGUAGE
columns.Comments: The filter type values selected for language during candidate search.

columns.Name: FILTER_LICENSE
columns.Comments: The filter type values selected for license during candidate search.

columns.Name: FILTER_JOB
columns.Comments: The filter type values selected for job during candidate search.

columns.Name: FILTER_SKILL
columns.Comments: The filter type values selected for skill during candidate search.

columns.Name: FILTER_REQUISITION
columns.Comments: The filter type values selected for the requisition during candidate search.

columns.Name: FILTER_INTERACTIONS_TYPE
columns.Comments: The filter type values selected for the interactions type code during candidate search.

columns.Name: FILTER_INTERACTIONS_DATE
columns.Comments: The filter type values selected for the interactions date during candidate search.

columns.Name: FILTER_EVENT
columns.Comments: The filter type values selected for the events during candidate search.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
